hints.use_when: need the fastest classification of task shape, risk, and smallest next step
need an explicit bounded plan, checks, and escalation boundaries
need the current bounded slice executed after the route and plan are already explicit
need contradiction checks, output review, or a named continue-stop-escalate decision
need a route-level decision about continue, pause, escalate, or distill
need rare deep synthesis, contradiction arbitration, or high-cost final judgment
need summaries, decisions, and memory candidates distilled after a non-trivial run
